case_title: SIGNATURE BUSINESS SYSTEMS CONSULTING, INC. VS. LIGHTBEAM ELECTRIC COMPANY

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER SIGNATURE BUSINESS SYSTEMS CONSULTING, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is GRANTED. No Opposition was filed.
